results.rendered_html: upa-patti—sama m. (in log.) a kind of contradiction in which both the contradicting assertions are supposed to be demonstrable (e.g. sound is uneternal, because it is produced; it is eternal, because it is not tangible),  Nyāyad. ;  Nyāyak.
